name: Apollo
subtitle: Full Correspondences
summary: Apollo is a crown that unifies — Sun disk; under Sun; in Leo; with XIX The Sun.
flowText: Apollo is a crown that unifies — Sun disk; under Sun; in Leo; with XIX The Sun.

related.name: ♇ Pluto
related.teaser: Pluto is the black sun — furnace of death, seed of rebirth, fire of shadows.

related.name: Citrine
related.teaser: Solar fire is the sovereign flame—the courage to act and become.

related.name: ☉ Sun
related.teaser: The Sun is the eternal lamp — source of clarity, fire of spirit, nobility of heart.

related.name: ♃ Jupiter
related.teaser: Jupiter is the thunder scepter — wheel of fate, king of sky, expansion of spirit.

related.name: Bragi
related.teaser: Bragi embodies sun, clarity, arts, prophecy — under Sun; in Leo.

related.name: Arawn
related.teaser: Arawn embodies sun, clarity, arts, prophecy — under Sun; in Leo.
